name: Xiaohongshu Knowledge Long Image
description: A vertically paced educational long image for Xiaohongshu notes, guides, checklists, and practical explainers.
usage: Use for 1080px-wide vertical Xiaohongshu-style knowledge posts. The first screen should work as a cover; following sections should read like save-worthy cards.
best_for: Practical explainers, lists, how-to guides, comparison notes, and creator-style knowledge posts.
Briefs that need a strong cover, sectioned takeaways, and a save/share-friendly ending.
avoid_for: Dense financial or technical reports that need many exact tables.
Corporate landing pages with navigation, pricing, or conversion forms.
layout_rules: Use a 1080 px wide vertical artboard with a strong cover block and 4-7 stacked content chapters.
Keep each chapter as one clear band with one idea, one short heading, and concise body copy.
Use numbered steps, badges, or mini callouts to make the reading path obvious in a screenshot.
Reserve a final save/share summary block instead of a generic footer.
style_rules: Use soft near-white or tinted paper backgrounds with one fresh primary color and a warm accent.
Prefer rounded 16-24 px content modules with light borders and very soft shadows.
Use expressive but readable Chinese display headings and compact body text with generous line height.
Add small icons, dots, dividers, or stickers sparingly; do not turn the page into a decoration board.
content_rules: Open with a concrete benefit or pain point, not a generic title.
Convert long paragraphs into scannable bullets, steps, formulas, or before/after notes.
Keep all claims grounded in the user's source material.
End with a practical recap that makes the image worth saving.
quality_checks: The first screen should work as a Xiaohongshu cover even when cropped.
Hierarchy must be visible at a glance.
Body copy must stay readable on a phone screenshot.
